steps.title: Express a as a percentage of b
steps.content:
The number a is 70% less than b, so a = b - 0.70b = 0.30b.
$$a = b - 0.70b = 0.30b$$

steps.title: Find c in terms of b
steps.content:
The number c is 80% greater than a, so c = a + 0.80a = 1.80a.
Substituting a = 0.30b gives c = 1.80 × 0.30b = 0.54b.
$$c = 1.80a = 1.80(0.30b) = 0.54b$$
Thus c is 0.54 times b.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
